goal: Execute an accepted guarded FIM route by delegating to the existing fim-complete path instead of introducing a second edit/apply implementation.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek fim-route --enable --execute --input 'complete src/deepseek.rs lines 2-3' --response '{"choices":[{"text":"//! routed completion"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":5,"completion_tokens":2}}' --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: A FIM route can be classified as safe but execution might fork a separate code path, bypassing deterministic replay, live transport retry handling, apply gates, or verification hooks.
